name: hermes-gateway
description: BFF gateway for Hermes mobile client → Hermes Web API

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; if (fs.existsSync('skills')) fs.cpSync('skills','dist/skills',{recursive:true}); if (fs.existsSync('public')) fs.cpSync('public','dist/public',{recursive:true});"
